name: AUTOSAR ARXML Review
_project: AI-Assisted Automotive Software Engineering Workflow — ETAS/Ford Motor Company
_purpose: n8n workflow: AUTOSAR ARXML review trigger with ISO 26262 confidence gate and Gmail escalation

_meta.description: Receives ARXML diffs via webhook, routes to config_agent running on host via uvicorn, applies ISO 26262 confidence gate, sends Gmail notification when human review needed.
_meta.safety_note: No AI output auto-committed to ARXML baseline. Human approval required per ADR-001.
_meta.agent_mode: uvicorn on host — use host.docker.internal:8001. Switch to config-agent:8001 when running via Docker Compose.

nodes.name: Webhook — ARXML diff received
nodes.notes: POST body: { arxml_diff, module, requirement_refs, context }

nodes.name: Config Agent — ARXML review
nodes.notes: Calls config_agent FastAPI on host port 8001. Timeout 600s (10 min) to allow phi4-mini cold start + LLM inference.

nodes.name: Human review required?
nodes.notes: ISO 26262 gate: routes to Gmail notification if human_review_required=true (confidence < 0.75 or error severity)

parameters.subject: =⚠️ ARXML Review — Human Approval Required | Confidence: {{ .confidence_score }}
parameters.message:
=

AUTOSAR ARXML Review — Human Approval Required

Confidence score: {{ .confidence_score }}

Rationale: {{ .rationale }}

Traceability refs: {{ .traceability_refs.join(', ') }}

Findings

{{ JSON.stringify(.findings, null, 2) }}

AI-assisted output. Human approval required before baseline entry per ADR-001.

nodes.name: Gmail — Human review notification
nodes.notes: Sends structured review findings to mathew.s.crawford@gmail.com when human review required. Replace with Jira when credentials available.

nodes.name: Set — review status
nodes.notes: Formats response after Gmail notification sent.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "auto_approved", confidence_score: .confidence_score, findings_count: .findings.length, human_review_required: false, ai_assisted: true }) }}

nodes.name: Auto-approve — respond to caller
nodes.notes: High-confidence results auto-approved. Logged in n8n execution history for audit trail.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "pending_human_review", confidence_score: .confidence_score, notification: "Email sent to mathew.s.crawford@gmail.com", human_review_required: true }) }}

nodes.name: Respond — pending review
nodes.notes: Returns pending status to caller. Caller should poll or wait for manual approval.
